description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a predominantly red body accented by gray and black details. The fuselage is sharply angular, with a pointed nose and swept-back wings that feature additional fin-like extensions, giving it an aggressive, high-speed appearance. Two large cylindrical jet engines are mounted at the rear, flanking the central tail section, and are colored in a contrasting gray. The cockpit is positioned forward and appears to be enclosed, integrated smoothly into the body with a tinted canopy. The tail design is unconventional, with a central vertical stabilizer and additional angular structures extending outward. No visible landing gear is present, suggesting a streamlined, possibly retractable configuration.
description: A futuristic, angular red airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear jet engines, and a forward enclosed cockpit. The design is aggressive and streamlined, with prominent gray engine nacelles and sharp tail features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the angular, swept-back wings with fin-like extensions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, low-mounted swept wings, and the twin rear jet engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two large cylindrical jet engines, the central tail fin, and the angular rear wing extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the sharp, aerodynamic profile and the placement of engines and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and additional fin-like extensions; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Central vertical stabilizer with angular, extended tail structures; unconventional tail design.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No visible landing gear; likely retractable or concealed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined, tinted canopy.
